description: Lurk Definition of Done — 20 criteria required for closed beta readiness

criteria.name: Mac Menu Bar Audio Capture
criteria.description: Mac menu bar app installs, captures system audio from Zoom/Google Meet, and transcribes locally.
acceptance_criteria: Mac app project exists with Swift/SwiftUI configuration
CoreAudio capture module is implemented for system audio tapping
Aggregate audio device creation for mirroring system output
Meeting app detection targets Zoom, Google Meet, Teams, FaceTime, Webex
Audio recording triggers on meeting detection
Whisper.cpp integration for local transcription
Raw audio never leaves the device (localOnly enforcement)
Opus audio format encoding is configured
System Preferences consent flow for audio privacy
Transcription output feeds into artifact pipeline

criteria.name: Chrome Extension Capture
criteria.description: Chrome extension captures artifacts from Google Docs and Gmail, delegates to Mac app via Native Messaging.
acceptance_criteria: Manifest V3 extension with correct permissions
DOM observer for docs.google.com capturing document:gdoc artifacts
DOM observer for mail.google.com capturing comm:email_sent and comm:email_received
Native Messaging host configuration (com.lurk.native_host)
chrome.runtime.connectNative integration for Mac app communication
Fallback to extension-local processing when Mac app is unavailable
React-based sidebar UI with Shadow DOM isolation
Sidebar tabs: Inbox, Activity, Ledger, Agents, Privacy
Content scripts properly scoped to target domains
Standalone mode with WASM PII detection for non-Mac users

criteria.name: iOS PR Review App
criteria.description: iOS app displays PRs, supports swipe-to-approve, and delivers push notifications.
acceptance_criteria: SwiftUI iOS app project exists
PR list view with diff display and justification
Swipe-to-approve gesture implementation
Swipe-to-reject gesture implementation
Push notification integration via APNs
Deep linking from push notification to specific PR
Agent management view (pause/resume, YOLO toggle)
Voice memo capture pipeline (record, transcribe, commit)
Offline support with action queueing
Shared Swift packages with macOS app via SPM

criteria.name: PII Scrubbing and Ledger Sync
criteria.description: Captured artifacts are PII-scrubbed on-device, committed to ledger, and synced to cloud.
acceptance_criteria: PII detection runs on-device before any network transit
Regex detectors for EMAIL, PHONE, SSN, CREDIT_CARD, API_KEY, TOKEN, PASSWORD, IP_ADDRESS
NER detectors for PERSON, ORGANIZATION, ADDRESS, DATE_OF_BIRTH
PII entities replaced with typed tokens (e.g., [PERSON_1], [EMAIL_2])
Content hash (SHA-256) computed from raw content
Redacted content stored separately from raw content
Feature bundle extraction for privacy-preserving metadata
Commit to local ledger (SQLite on Mac/iOS)
Sync to cloud Firestore with only redacted content
Three-layer privacy model enforced: on-device, redacted transit, stored

criteria.name: Personal Agent with Sonnet 4.6
criteria.description: Personal agent reads ledger, detects stale references, forks, and opens PRs using Claude Sonnet 4.6.
acceptance_criteria: Agent orchestrator service exists and is deployable
Personal agent type registered in agent configuration
Ledger reading capability with proper ACL scoping
Staleness detection algorithm comparing artifact timestamps and related artifact changes
Fork creation from source artifact to agent branch
PR opening with title, description, diff, and justification
Claude Sonnet 4.6 model configured for personal agent tasks
Action budget enforcement (max actions per time window)
Agent trigger configuration (schedule, event-based, or both)
Confidence scoring on proposed changes

criteria.name: Org Agent with Opus 4.6
criteria.description: Org agent performs deep analysis using Claude Opus 4.6.
acceptance_criteria: Org-level agent type registered with org-wide read scope
Claude Opus 4.6 model configured for deep analysis tasks
Cross-team artifact analysis capability
Conflict detection across organizational boundaries
Synthesis artifact generation (meta:synthesis type)
Higher action budget than personal agents
Org admin approval gates for sensitive operations
LLM gateway routes org agent requests to Opus model
Deep analysis prompts versioned in /prompts directory
Results stored as org-level artifacts in appropriate ledgers

criteria.name: Voice Agent for Meetings
criteria.description: Voice agent transcribes meetings, generates summaries, and opens PRs on affected artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: Voice agent type registered in agent configuration
Meeting audio intake from Mac app transcription pipeline
Summary generation using Claude Sonnet 4.6
Action item extraction from meeting transcripts
Affected artifact identification by cross-referencing transcript with ledger
PR creation on affected artifacts with meeting-derived changes
comm:call_summary artifact type generation
Meeting summary prompt templates in /prompts/meeting_summary
Integration with notification service for summary delivery
Speaker attribution in transcription output

criteria.name: Calendar Agent
criteria.description: Calendar agent reviews upcoming meetings and suggests cancellations.
acceptance_criteria: Calendar agent type registered in agent configuration
Calendar API integration (Google Calendar) for reading events
Cross-reference meetings with artifact activity
Cancellation recommendation logic based on artifact coverage
meta:calendar_review artifact generation
Notification to meeting organizer with cancellation suggestion
Schedule-based trigger (runs before start of day)
Calendar review prompt templates in /prompts/calendar_review
Configurable aggressiveness for cancellation suggestions
Respect for user preferences on which meetings to evaluate

criteria.name: Customer Health Agent
criteria.description: Customer health agent computes health scores from cross-functional artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: Customer health agent type registered in agent configuration
Cross-functional artifact reading (sales, support, engineering, CS)
CustomerHealthSignal computation with healthScore (0-100)
Trend classification: improving, stable, declining, critical
Signal sources: call_sentiment, support_tickets, engagement_frequency, contract_renewal
Alert levels: none, watch, action_required, escalation
meta:customer_health artifact generation
Firestore customerHealth collection updates
Notification to account owner when alertLevel >= action_required
Customer health prompt templates in /prompts/customer_health

criteria.name: YOLO Mode Auto-Merge
criteria.description: YOLO mode auto-merges PRs meeting configurable criteria.
acceptance_criteria: YOLO mode toggle in user preferences and org policy
Configurable criteria: confidence threshold, agent types, artifact types
Auto-merge eligibility check on PR creation
Automatic merge execution when criteria are met
Rollback window configuration (time-based undo)
Notification on auto-merge (non-blocking, for awareness)
YOLO config stored in ledger and user profile
Org-level YOLO policy can restrict or disable
Audit log entry for every auto-merge action
Kill switch can disable YOLO mode org-wide

criteria.name: PR Voice Narration via TTS
criteria.description: PR voice narration works via OpenAI TTS on iOS.
acceptance_criteria: TTS service exists with OpenAI TTS API integration
PR summary text converted to speech audio
Audio file stored in GCS and served via CDN
voiceNarrationUrl field populated on PR documents
iOS app plays voice narration inline on PR view
Push notification includes audio attachment option
TTS generation triggered on PR creation
Multiple voice options configurable
Audio format compatible with iOS playback (AAC/MP3)
Fallback when TTS service is unavailable

criteria.name: Slack Migration
criteria.description: Migration from Slack works via API import and agentic Browserbase crawl.
acceptance_criteria: Migration service exists and is deployable
Slack API import mode using Slack Export API + Web API
Agentic browser crawl mode using Browserbase SDK
OAuth2 authentication flow for Slack workspace admin
Channel-by-channel crawl strategy implementation
Message to artifact mapping (text -> document:note, files -> appropriate type)
Relationship mapping (threads, replies, cross-channel links)
PII scrubbing on imported content before commit
Migration plan generation with volume estimation
Admin preview and approval before commit
Migration verification with count comparison and quality check
Rollback capability for entire migration batch

criteria.name: Agent Marketplace and Builder
criteria.description: Agent marketplace offers 7+ built-in templates; custom agent builder works.
acceptance_criteria: Agent marketplace UI in web admin console
Minimum 7 built-in agent templates in agentTemplates collection
Templates include: personal, team, org, voice, calendar, customer_health, analytics
Custom agent builder UI (low-code interface)
Configurable prompts, triggers, capabilities, and scope per template
Agent installation flow from marketplace to active agent
Agent SDK package for building custom agents
Template versioning and update mechanism
Category browsing and search in marketplace
Agent rating/feedback system via feedback collection

criteria.name: Local-Only Mode
criteria.description: Local-only mode stops all network traffic immediately.
acceptance_criteria: Local-only mode toggle in Mac app, iOS app, and Chrome extension
All network requests cease immediately on activation
Cloud sync paused with queued operations preserved
Agent execution paused (no Claude API calls)
Local ledger operations continue functioning
PII detection continues running locally
Visual indicator showing local-only mode is active
Graceful reconnection when local-only mode is deactivated
No data loss during local-only period
Feature flag: local_only_mode available at org policy level

criteria.name: Kill Switches at All Levels
criteria.description: Kill switches work at all levels (org, team, agent, user, migration, meeting).
acceptance_criteria: org_global_kill: stops everything org-wide
org_agent_kill: stops all agent execution
org_capture_kill: stops all artifact capture
org_meeting_capture_kill: stops meeting audio capture
org_migration_kill: stops all active migrations
team_kill:{teamId}: stops all activity for a specific team
agent_kill:{agentId}: stops a specific agent
user_kill:{userId}: stops all activity for a specific user
federation_kill:{federationId}: stops cross-org federation
Kill switch UI in web admin console
Kill switches take effect within seconds
Audit log entry for every kill switch activation

criteria.name: Privacy Regression Tests
criteria.description: Privacy regression tests confirm no raw text or audio leaves the device.
acceptance_criteria: Test suite verifying no raw text in outgoing HTTP requests
Test suite verifying no raw audio data in network traffic
Test suite verifying no raw text stored in Firestore documents
Test suite verifying no raw text in Cloud Run service logs
Network traffic inspection in integration tests
Redaction verification: all PII tokens present in transit content
Content hash verification: raw content hashes match but raw content absent
Mac app audit of all network call sites
Chrome extension audit of all fetch/XHR calls
iOS app audit of all URLSession calls

criteria.name: PII Detection Recall >95%
criteria.description: PII detection achieves >95% recall across all entity types.
acceptance_criteria: PII test dataset with labeled ground truth for all entity types
EMAIL detection recall >95%
PHONE detection recall >95%
SSN detection recall >95%
CREDIT_CARD detection recall >95%
PERSON (NER) detection recall >95%
ORGANIZATION (NER) detection recall >95%
ADDRESS (NER) detection recall >95%
Precision >90% across all entity types (acceptable false positive rate)
Parity test: Swift and WASM implementations produce same results
PII service server-side validation as defense-in-depth

criteria.name: Cross-Org Federation
criteria.description: Cross-org federation works with aggressive redaction.
acceptance_criteria: Federation agreement creation between two orgs
Shared scope configuration (which artifact types, teams)
Aggressive redaction applied to all cross-org content
federations collection in Firestore with approval from both orgs
Expiration date enforcement on federation agreements
federation_kill switch for emergency disconnection
ACL resolver handles cross-org access tier calculations
Redaction level configuration per federation
Audit trail for all cross-org artifact access
Guest access tokens with limited scope

criteria.name: Comprehensive Audit Logs
criteria.description: Audit logs capture all actions with full lineage.
acceptance_criteria: Audit service exists and is deployable
audits collection in Firestore for real-time access
BigQuery export for long-term audit storage and analysis
All agent actions logged with actorType=agent
All user actions logged with actorType=user
Kill switch activations logged
Policy changes logged with version diff
PR lifecycle events logged (create, review, merge, close)
Migration events logged with full execution trace
Lineage tracking: every audit entry references source action chain

criteria.name: Performance at Scale
criteria.description: System handles 100 concurrent users with <500ms P95 for PR review.
acceptance_criteria: Load test configuration for 100 concurrent users
PR review API endpoint responds in <500ms P95
Artifact listing responds in <500ms P95
Agent orchestrator handles concurrent agent executions
Firestore read/write latency within acceptable bounds
Cloud Run auto-scaling configured for all services
API gateway rate limiting prevents abuse
Connection pooling for database operations
CDN caching for voice narration audio files
Performance monitoring and alerting configured
